meaning: n.强烈,剧烈,强度 亮度
examples: The solemn intensity of Jade's gaze discomfited him.
Everyone I know who kept it up at that intensity is burned-out.
The intensity of the work left little room for personal grief or anxiety.
The most striking thing about a road show with Will, however, is the sheer intensity of it.
Secret: All developing (and developed) economies reduce their emissions intensity, unless something is really wrong.
